original_abstract: Recently, nanoparticle (NP) synthesis has evolved into a green nanotechnology field, requiring more methods for the eco-synthesis of nanoparticles due to the high costs of other chemical–physical methods.
humanized_abstract: Nanoparticle (NP) synthesis has evolved into a green nanotechnology field and therefore needs new eco-friendly methods for the eco-synthesis of nanoparticles, because the expensive chemical–physical methods cannot be considered as economic solutions.

document.output: Nanoparticle (NP) synthesis has evolved into a green nanotechnology field and therefore needs new eco-friendly methods for the eco-synthesis of nanoparticles, because the expensive chemical–physical methods cannot be considered as economic solutions.
document.input: Recently, nanoparticle (NP) synthesis has evolved into a green nanotechnology field, requiring more methods for the eco-synthesis of nanoparticles due to the high costs of other chemical–physical methods.
